description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named ActionsCI that builds and tests a project on multiple platforms. Trigger the workflow on push to the develop branch and on pull requests to master and develop branches. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building on different environments including ubuntu-24.04, ubuntu-22.04, macos-latest, macos-14, macos-13, and windows-latest. Each job should check out the code, install dependencies, configure, build, and test the project.
